matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Archaeological Research is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The MPhil in Archaeological Research aims to give students an excellent grounding in higher-level research, which provides an ideal platform for PhD studies.
